name: sod gate: concur verdict from second verifier allows the commit through (exit 0)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/verify && printf '{"pr_sha":"abc123","verdict":"concur","reviewer":"verifier-bot"}' > .claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json" --enforce && echo ok 1>&2
